summary: Restaurant website project with food photography. User wants chicken taco images corrected to show actual chicken tacos, salsa/chips and quesadilla images restored from live version, and new catering picture retained at the bottom of the website.
known_issues: Chicken taco images are not showing actual chicken — need correct chicken taco photos
Salsa/chips image missing — needs to be restored from live version
Quesadilla image missing — needs to be restored from live version
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Authentic Mexican chicken tacos with visible grilled seasoned chicken, fresh cilantro, diced onion, lime wedge, on corn tortillas, warm natural lighting (chicken-tacos.dim_800x600.png)
- Mexican-style chips and salsa — crispy tortilla chips in a basket alongside a bowl of vibrant red salsa, garnished with cilantro, rustic wood or tile surface (chips-salsa.dim_800x600.png)
- Golden crispy quesadilla cut into wedges showing melted cheese and chicken filling, served on a wooden board with sour cream and salsa dipping sides, warm lighting (quesadilla.dim_800x600.png)

existing_features.title: Replace the current chicken taco images in the MenuSection with correct images that clearly show chicken tacos (with visible grilled/seasoned chicken as the filling). The images must look authentic and appetizing.
Restore the salsa and chips menu item image in the MenuSection. This image was present in a previous version (live version) and must be brought back to the chips & salsa menu card.
Restore the quesadilla menu item image in the MenuSection. This image was present in a previous version (live version) and must be brought back to the quesadilla menu card.

new_feature_requests.summary: Retain the new catering section banner image (the enlarged catering picture with the woman) at the bottom of the website in CateringSection. Do not revert or replace this image.
